metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for visual generation under compliance lens, but blocked due to insufficient safe context.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for visual generation under compliance lens, but blocked due to insufficient safe context.
mission.success_definition: Not definable: no measurable thresholds for compliance pass/fail, no memory write risk severity scale, no visual generation output validation criteria.

in_scope.item: Global cross-border visual generation audit with memory_write_risk detection. Scope cannot be finalized without jurisdiction and data classification.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Not definable: no measurable thresholds for compliance pass/fail, no memory write risk severity scale, no visual generation output validation criteria.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.audit_scope: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for visual generation under compliance lens, but blocked due to insufficient safe context.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_policy: Use source evidence and mark unsupported claims.

inspection_steps.item: Global cross-border visual generation audit with memory_write_risk detection. Scope cannot be finalized without jurisdiction and data classification.

findings_contract.item: Not definable: no measurable thresholds for compliance pass/fail, no memory write risk severity scale, no visual generation output validation criteria.

receipt_contract.item: Blocked state receipt with repair instructions. No executable agent output until missing context is provided.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Case DSS-040 raw_intent contains chaotic_power_user input with memory_write_risk under compliance_lens. Missing context (no jurisdiction, no data classification, no visual generation pipeline details), urgent language without structured constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria (no measurable success thresholds), and partial constraints that cannot be resolved without hallucination. Unsafe certainty blocked to prevent unauthorized memory write or compliance bypass. Repair receipt: requires explicit jurisdiction, data sensitivity level, visual generation model version, audit frequency, and defined compliance framework (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA).

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
